completedPhaseClaims.summary: Scope 1 (cache-owned MSFT market truth) finalized under consolidated ownership on a clean committed tree (baseline HEAD 2577a36). Implementation is committed: validators msftValidateQuoteEnvelope/msftValidateBarsEnvelope, daily-only derivation msftDeriveDailyTechnicals, immutable msftBuildAcceptedState, and the MsftJulyModel cache-first null-safe boot. All twelve Feature 009 Scope 1 selftest assertions pass; node scripts/selftest.mjs = 645 passed/0 failed exit 0 (TP-009-S1-01); the browser regression tests/msft-july-market-refresh.spec.mjs (TP-009-S1-02) passes with zero provider requests. Containment verified against the current committed baseline: no page-local credential resurrection, Bond Regime and MSFT registry records intact (3x each), marker-bounded Feature 009 selftest group, no shared/data/brief regression. Certification pending bubbles.audit + bubbles.validate; certification.* and feature status unchanged.

Scope 2 (isolated degraded market states) implemented additively in msft-july-print-model.html: monotonic acceptance msftShouldAcceptQuote/msftShouldAcceptBars, top-level msftAggregateMarketStatus (the boot IIFE now delegates to it), the closed msftSafeReasonCopy display map, the msftReduceResourceOutcome per-resource reducer, and the public window.MsftJulyModel.applyResourceOutcome production operation. TP-009-S2-01 red (function not found: msftAggregateMarketStatus) then green: node scripts/selftest.mjs = 650 passed/0 failed exit 0 with five new Feature 009 Scope 2 assertions. TP-009-S2-02 red (applyResourceOutcome absent) then green: the focused browser regression drives quote-missing bars-only truth, bars-missing quote-only truth, and stale-quote-plus-malformed-bars isolation with zero provider requests and no request interception; the full msft spec (2 tests) stays green so Scope 1 did not regress. Containment: only the four allowed surfaces changed, no page-local credential, no 390.49 spot, model cutoff 2026-07-06 intact, Feature 009 selftest edits strictly inside the markers, excluded surfaces untouched. Certification pending bubbles.audit + bubbles.validate; certification.* and feature status unchanged.

Scope 3 (market/model interaction integrity) implemented additively in msft-july-print-model.html: the pure top-level msftBuildValuationRead(model, quote, probabilities, impliedMovePct) spot-relative valuation read with finite-positive guards and closed reason codes (quote-required, positive-modeled-eps-required, positive-implied-price-required, probability-weights-required, non-negative-implied-move-required; never 0/NaN/Infinity), a refresh-failed branch in msftReduceResourceOutcome for quote and bars that records the failure receipt while preserving the last accepted value/clocks/rows, the public window.MsftJulyModel.applyRefreshOutcome production refresh operation (requestSeq-stamped monotonic acceptance plus spot repricing on genuine accept), the read-only readValuation/snapshotScenarioInputs diagnostics, the #o_pricevs rendering wired through msftBuildValuationRead, and removal of the autoImpliedMove write into the user-owned impMove input (options IV evidence retained). TP-009-S3-01 red (function not found: msftBuildValuationRead) then green: node scripts/selftest.mjs = 658 passed/0 failed exit 0 with eight new Feature 009 Scope 3 assertions. TP-009-S3-02 red (applyRefreshOutcome/readValuation/snapshotScenarioInputs absent) then green: the focused browser regression edits the real Q4-revenue/depreciation/selected-P/E/implied-move controls, drives an accepted newer spot (reprices spotOverEps 24.21->24.93 and #o_pricevs $394->$406 while modeledEps and the selected P/E 26 stay unchanged), an older out-of-order candidate (newer seq 2 retained), and a failed refresh (accepted value+clocks preserved, MSFT-QUOTE-HTTP recorded), with the seeded options snapshot proving impMove stays 5.5 (autoImpliedMove write removed) and the IV evidence retained; zero provider requests, no interception; the full msft spec (3 tests) stays green so Scopes 1 and 2 did not regress. Containment: only the four allowed surfaces changed, no 390.49 spot, model cutoff 2026-07-06 intact (5 occurrences), only centralized RLDATA transport, Feature 009 selftest edits strictly inside the markers (BEGIN 1830 / END 2261). Certification pending bubbles.audit + bubbles.validate; certification.* and feature status unchanged.

Scope 4 (one-state user and export surfaces) implemented additively in msft-july-print-model.html: the pure top-level buildMsftCsvRows(state, exportedAt) versioned CSV projection (msft-july-market-refresh/v1) with the full separated model/quote/bars/technical/scenario/valuation field inventory, raw finite values, empty-with-status/reason for unavailable fields, no data_as_of and no static spot fallback; a #modeSeg role=tablist with a shared truth strip, a Simple cockpit tabpanel, and a Power tabpanel that both render from ONE accepted state; the setMode/applyMode persisted-mode engine (localStorage msftJulyMode) with roving-tablist keyboard support (arrows/Home/End/Enter/Space), hidden+inert inactive view, and Power-only synchronous canvas draws (guarded in recompute + on Power-show + debounced resize); the exportScenario rewrite that reconstructs one accepted-state snapshot via msftComposeCsvState + buildMsftCsvRows; a central-policy-gated fetchLive that reads RLDATA.credentialStatus/useCredential and preserves the cache-first accepted state on disabled/unconfigured/refused while linking index.html#data-settings, with NO page-local credential, direct provider URL, or tokenized transport; the read-only window.MsftJulyModel.setMode/displayMode/buildCsvSnapshot diagnostics; and a msft:accepted-state notification (from replaceAcceptedState/applyResourceOutcome/applyRefreshOutcome) so every surface re-renders from one accepted state. The Results FY27E headline was moved to a shared card visible in both modes so the Scope 3 #o_pricevs read is not regressed. TP-009-S4-01 red (function not found: buildMsftCsvRows, 658 passed/1 failed) then green: node scripts/selftest.mjs = 664 passed/0 failed exit 0 with six new Feature 009 Scope 4 CSV assertions. TP-009-S4-02 and TP-009-S4-03 red (planned mode/export surface absent) then green: the two focused browser regressions prove Simple-default one-state mode parity (spot 394.007 in both modes, no scenario mutation, inactive view hidden+inert), the central refresh preserves cache truth with a settings link (centralState=disabled), the msft-july-market-refresh/v1 CSV snapshot with no data_as_of, zero body horizontal overflow at 1440/768/390/320 in both modes, roving-tablist keyboard nav, and positive nonblank Power canvas pixels; a real 390px Power overflow was found and fixed in-scope (grid-item min-width:0 286->59, overflow-x:clip 59->0). TP-009-S4-04 credential canary run unmodified stays green (4 passed). The full msft spec (5 tests) stays green so Scopes 1-3 did not regress. Containment: only the three allowed surfaces changed, provider-credentials.spec.mjs unmodified, no excluded surface touched, model cutoff 2026-07-06 intact, no 390.49 spot, no page-local credential/direct URL, selftest edits strictly inside the Feature 009 markers. Certification pending bubbles.audit + bubbles.validate; certification.* and feature status unchanged.

Scope 5 (static publication and direct consumers) implemented additively in msft-july-print-model.html: the pure top-level buildMsftStaticToolRead(baseModel, marketState) projects a strict rl-tool-read/v1 envelope + msft-static-model-read/v1 metrics from the COMMITTED BASE assumptions plus accepted source-qualified market provenance (separate quote/bar/technical clocks; no raw bar row, active control set, or credential), with false activeUserScenarioIncluded/recommendationEligible/marketAggregationEligible and a static 2026-07-06 as-of a newer market timestamp never advances; and publishMsftStaticRead() (calculateAnnual(PRESETS.base), never active controls) is called at the end of renderMsftSurfaces so RLDATA.putToolRead republishes after each accepted-state change. notes/msft-july-print-model.md reconciled to one two-clock truth (new section 0b naming data/options/MSFT.json spot,asof,fetched and data/bars/MSFT.json asof,fetched,rows.length as separate source-owned evidence; obsolete hard-coded 368.57 instruction removed; sections 2/6 fundamentals/cost-cycle not re-verified or re-dated; section 9 adds the Feature 009 validation commands). Only the exact msft-july-print-model records in tools.json and index.html changed (updated/blurb/tags; id/title/file/notes/status/nav/briefing.static-model profile stable; every non-MSFT record byte-unchanged). TP-009-S5-01 red (function not found: buildMsftStaticToolRead, 664 passed/1 failed) then green: node scripts/selftest.mjs = 672 passed/0 failed exit 0 with eight new Scope 5 assertions. TP-009-S5-02 red (planned static-model tool read must be published through RLDATA, Received null) then green: the focused browser regression proves the live read is availability=current asOf=2026-07-06 schema=msft-static-model-read/v1, committedPe=22 holds after the active fwdPE is edited to 40 (committed Base not active), rawRowsField=false, market provenance equals the parsed caches (valueUsd=394.007, bars.cutoff=2026-07-17), and direct consumers show toolsJsonMsftRecords=1 indexIdCount=1 with the notes two-clock truth. TP-009-S5-03 full Feature 009 regression = 6 passed (all fourteen SCN-009-001..014); TP-009-S5-04 source-lock actual=PASS (16/0 adversarial); TP-009-S5-05 playwright Version 1.61.1; TP-009-S5-06 credential canary 4 passed with the file unmodified. Containment: only the six allowed surfaces plus spec-009 artifacts changed, excluded shared/data/brief/fetch/provider-credentials paths untouched, selftest one hunk inside the Feature 009 markers, model cutoff 2026-07-06 intact (8x) and no 390.49/368.57 resurrected. artifact-lint PASSED; cli.sh doctor 17 passed/0 failed; traceability-guard manifest and 14 scenario mappings green with the known BUG-018 G068 nested-Tier DoD-parser failure across all five scopes. Certification pending bubbles.audit + bubbles.validate; certification.* and feature status unchanged.

statusDiscipline.scopePickupRule: All dependsOn scopes must be Done. Pick the lowest-numbered eligible scope.
statusDiscipline.specDoneRequires: All scopes done. certification.completedScopes contains all scope IDs and bubbles.validate has certified promotion.

notes: Analyst bootstrap initialized during an orchestrated full-delivery goal run. Execution history is reserved for the parent orchestrator; status, completed claims, scope progress, and certification remain at baseline.
